name: make-first
description: Make-centric development plugin: enforces Makefile structure, TDD practices, shell scripting standards, and the uv/Python toolchain. Auto-redirects direct tool invocations to make targets.

_meta.notes: pre-tool hook uses modifiedArgs to auto-redirect direct tool calls to make targets with additionalContext for agent learning; CLI 1.0.25 fixes skill instruction persistence across turns — all 5 skills now reliably carry context through multi-turn sessions
